rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding assessment of JMR articles from 2013–2019, focused on journal-wide topic/method diversity and domain convergence, not on virality mechanisms or emotion-based sharing models. The cited paper is a 2012 empirical article on online content virality (outside the citing paper’s coded 2013–2019 window), and the only linkage provided is a single DOI match with no in-text evidence of methodological or theoretical reliance, suggesting an incidental/background mention.
